name: Intellia Therapeutics, Inc.
description: Intellia Therapeutics, Inc. is a leading clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to revolutionizing medicine through the development of potentially curative therapeutics. The company leverages advanced CRISPR-based genome editing technologies, including both systemic in vivo editing delivered via lipid nanoparticles and ex vivo engineering of immune cells for oncology. By focusing on these innovative gene-editing platforms, Intellia aims to address the root causes of genetic diseases and transform the treatment landscape for patients with severe conditions, positioning itself at the forefront of the rapidly evolving field of genetic medicine.
